sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Topics 52

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Topics 52:1
items.html: (to the question) When the Nukva receives all the AB, SAG, MA, BON of her HaVaYaH of BON, she then has a complete Nefesh and is fit to bear. (p. 743, Item 12)
